da.hero_subtitle: Lær de passionerede yogalærere og mentorer bag Yoga Bible at kende. Hvert teammedlem bringer årtiers erfaring, dedikation og en unik tilgang til din yogarejse.
da.intro_text: Hos Yoga Bible tror vi på, at en fantastisk underviser kan forvandle din praksis. Vores team er sammensat af erfarne yogalærere med unikke specialer — fra vinyasa flow til yin yoga, fra pranayama til filosofi. Hver underviser bringer autentisk viden, varme og et dybt engagement i din udvikling.
da.teacher1_specialties: Vinyasa & Hot Yoga, Sequencing, Business of Yoga
da.teacher1_bio: Grundlægger af Yoga Bible og tidligere Triangle Yoga Academy. Shamir har uddannet over 500 yogalærere siden 2014 og underviser i Vinyasa, Hatha og Hot Yoga. Han sætter kvalitet over profit og skaber et uddannelsesmiljø, der er grundigt, ærligt og dybt engageret.
da.teacher1_img_alt: Mister Shamir — Lead Teacher hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher2_specialties: Inversioner & Arm Balances, Kreativ Vinyasa, Teknik & Alignment
da.teacher2_bio: Over 20 års yogarejse og et årti som instruktør og lead trainer med mere end 3.000 undervisningstimer. Anna har turneret internationalt med Patrick Beach og er ekspert i inversioner, arm balances og kreativ Vinyasa-sekvensering. Kendt for skarp indsigt, struktur og kreativitet.
da.teacher2_img_alt: Anna Herceg — Lead Trainer hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher3_bio: Charlotte har en klar, direkte undervisningsstil, der gør kroppen forståelig. Specialiseret i funktionel anatomi og skadeforebyggelse — hun oversætter kompleks viden om knogler, led og muskler til brugbare redskaber for kommende yogalærere.
da.teacher3_quote: Forstå kroppen, og du forstår bevægelsen.
da.teacher3_img_alt: Charlotte Nielsen — Anatomy & Alignment underviser hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher4_bio: Eva underviser i yogafilosofi på en måde, der forbinder de klassiske tekster med hverdagen. Hun fordyber sig i Yin Yoga, meditation og den indre rejse — og bringer ro, nærvær og dybde til uddannelsen.
da.teacher4_quote: De gamle tekster taler stadig til os — vi skal bare lytte.
da.teacher4_img_alt: Eva Fink — Yin Yoga & Filosofi underviser hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher5_bio: Megs yogarejse begyndte som et svar på udbrændthed fra en lang karriere i modebranchen. Med en baggrund i konkurrencesport søgte hun nye bevægelsesformer og fandt i yoga et dybtgående middel til helbredelse af krop og sind. Efter flere års dedikeret praksis færdiggjorde hun sin 200-timers yogalæreruddannelse hos Yoga Bible. Hendes undervisning balancerer styrke og blødhed i hver time og skaber et tilgængeligt, opløftende rum for alle.
da.teacher5_quote: Yoga er for alle og enhver krop.
da.teacher5_img_alt: Meg Conard — Underviser hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher6_bio: Vanjas liv har været præget af bevægelse og tilpasning. Opvokset binationalt med en dyb eventyrlyst har hun rejst og fordybet sig i kulturer verden over. Hendes yogarejse begyndte i Tyskland under en krævende karriere i bilindustrien, hvor yoga blev en kilde til balance og selverkendelse. Hendes timer blander styrke med blødhed, kreative flows og mindful overgange — ligesom livet selv skifter, fokuserer hendes undervisning på bevidsthed og kontrol i bevægelsen.
da.teacher6_quote: Ligesom livet skifter, handler yoga om at navigere overgange med intention og ro.
da.teacher6_img_alt: Vanja Wylie — Underviser hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher7_bio: Sita er oprindeligt fra England og har tilbragt størstedelen af sit voksenliv med at rejse og optræde som akrobat. Med 15 års erfaring hos Cirque du Soleil og andre verdenskendte selskaber bringer hun et unikt perspektiv til yoga — med fokus på både fysisk styrke og mindful bevægelse. I 2017 gennemførte hun sin 200-timers uddannelse i Ashtanga og Hatha Yoga i Rishikesh, Indien. Hendes timer kombinerer mindful bevægelse, styrke, fleksibilitet og breathwork med hendes unikke blik som scenekunstner.
da.teacher7_quote: Yoga rydder mental støj og bringer ro til krop og sind.
da.teacher7_img_alt: Sita Bhuller — Underviser hos Yoga Bible
da.teacher8_bio: Kerti tog sin 200-timers yogauddannelse hos Yoga Bible og har siden fortsat sin praksis i studiet. Det sidste år har hun undervist fast hos os, hvor hun hurtigt er blevet en populær og vellidt underviser. Med baggrund i Hatha, Vinyasa og Yin Yoga guider Kerti sine elever med ro, nærvær og fokus på åndedrættet. Hendes undervisning kombinerer styrke og fleksibilitet med en mindful tilgang, der hjælper eleverne til at bevæge sig med intention og nærvær.
da.teacher8_quote: Bevæg dig med intention og nærvær.
da.teacher8_img_alt: Kerti Henriksen — Underviser hos Yoga Bible
da.values_subtitle: Fælles værdier, der definerer Yoga Bible-oplevelsen
da.value1_desc: Hver underviser bringer ægte viden fra årelang personlig praksis og studier. Vi underviser fra erfaring, ikke kun fra bøger.
da.value2_desc: Vi tilpasser vores undervisning til den enkelte. Uanset dit niveau møder vi dig der, hvor du er, og guider dig videre.
da.value3_desc: Vores undervisere er evige elever. Vi efteruddanner os konstant og bringer ny viden og inspiration til dig.
da.value4_desc: Vi bygger et inkluderende, støttende miljø, hvor alle kan vokse. Yoga Bible er mere end et studie — det er en familie.
da.approach_text: Yoga Bibles undervisere kombinerer traditionel yogavisdom med moderne pædagogik. Vi tror på en integreret tilgang, der forbinder asana, pranayama, filosofi og anatomi til en helhedsorienteret uddannelse.
da.approach1_desc: Maksimalt 20 elever pr. hold sikrer personlig opmærksomhed og dybdegående feedback fra dine undervisere.
da.approach2_desc: Vores undervisere giver individuel, koncentreret vejledning, der hjælper dig med at forstå og mærke hver stilling korrekt.
da.approach3_desc: Vi binder filosofi og anatomi direkte sammen med praksis, så du ikke bare ved hvordan — men også hvorfor.
da.cta_title: Klar til at Lære fra de Bedste?
da.cta_text: Ansøg til Yoga Bibles yogalæreruddannelse og start din rejse med vores erfarne underviserteam.

en.hero_subtitle: Get to know the passionate yoga teachers and mentors behind Yoga Bible. Each team member brings decades of experience, dedication, and a unique approach to your yoga journey.
en.intro_text: At Yoga Bible, we believe a great teacher can transform your practice. Our team is composed of experienced yoga teachers with unique specialties — from vinyasa flow to yin yoga, from pranayama to philosophy. Each teacher brings authentic knowledge, warmth, and a deep commitment to your growth.
en.teacher1_specialties: Vinyasa & Hot Yoga, Sequencing, Business of Yoga
en.teacher1_bio: Founder of Yoga Bible and former Triangle Yoga Academy. Shamir has trained over 500 yoga teachers since 2014 and teaches Vinyasa, Hatha, and Hot Yoga. He puts quality over profit and creates a training environment that is thorough, honest, and deeply committed.
en.teacher1_img_alt: Mister Shamir — Lead Teacher at Yoga Bible
en.teacher2_specialties: Inversions & Arm Balances, Creative Vinyasa, Technique & Alignment
en.teacher2_bio: Over 20 years on her yoga journey and a decade as instructor and lead trainer with more than 3,000 teaching hours. Anna has toured internationally with Patrick Beach and is an expert in inversions, arm balances, and creative Vinyasa sequencing. Known for sharp insight, structure, and creativity.
en.teacher2_img_alt: Anna Herceg — Lead Trainer at Yoga Bible
en.teacher3_bio: Charlotte has a clear, direct teaching style that makes the body understandable. Specialized in functional anatomy and injury prevention — she translates complex knowledge about bones, joints, and muscles into practical tools for aspiring yoga teachers.
en.teacher3_quote: Understand the body, and you understand movement.
en.teacher3_img_alt: Charlotte Nielsen — Anatomy & Alignment teacher at Yoga Bible
en.teacher4_bio: Eva teaches yoga philosophy in a way that connects the classical texts with everyday life. She immerses herself in Yin Yoga, meditation, and the inner journey — bringing calm, presence, and depth to the training.
en.teacher4_quote: The ancient texts still speak to us — we just need to listen.
en.teacher4_img_alt: Eva Fink — Yin Yoga & Philosophy teacher at Yoga Bible
en.teacher5_bio: Meg's yoga journey began as an answer to burnout from a long career in the fashion industry. Coming from a competitive sports background, she sought new forms of movement and found in yoga a profound remedy for both mind and body. After years of dedicated practice, she completed her 200-hour teacher training at Yoga Bible. Her teaching balances strength and softness in every class, creating an accessible, uplifting space for everyone.
en.teacher5_quote: Yoga is for everyone and every body.
en.teacher5_img_alt: Meg Conard — Teacher at Yoga Bible
en.teacher6_bio: Vanja's life has been shaped by continuous movement and adaptation. Growing up bi-national with a deep sense of adventure, she has traveled and immersed herself in cultures across the globe. Her yoga journey began in Germany during a demanding career in the automotive industry, where yoga became a source of balance and self-discovery. Her classes blend strength with softness, creative flows and mindful transitions — just as life constantly shifts, her teaching focuses on cultivating awareness and control through movement.
en.teacher6_quote: Just as life shifts, yoga is about navigating transitions with intention and grace.
en.teacher6_img_alt: Vanja Wylie — Teacher at Yoga Bible
en.teacher7_bio: Sita is originally from England and has spent much of her adult life traveling and performing as an acrobat. With 15 years of experience at Cirque du Soleil and other world-renowned companies, she brings a unique perspective to yoga — emphasizing both physical strength and mindful movement. In 2017, she completed her 200-hour training in Ashtanga and Hatha Yoga in Rishikesh, India. Her classes combine mindful movement, strength, flexibility, and breathwork with her unique perspective as a performing artist.
en.teacher7_quote: Yoga clears mental clutter and brings calm to body and mind.
en.teacher7_img_alt: Sita Bhuller — Teacher at Yoga Bible
en.teacher8_bio: Kerti completed her 200-hour yoga teacher training at Yoga Bible and has since continued her practice in the studio. Over the past year, she has been teaching regularly with us and has quickly become a popular and well-liked instructor. With a background in Hatha, Vinyasa, and Yin Yoga, Kerti guides her students with calm, presence, and a focus on the breath. Her teaching combines strength and flexibility with a mindful approach that helps students move with intention and awareness.
en.teacher8_img_alt: Kerti Henriksen — Teacher at Yoga Bible
en.values_subtitle: Shared values that define the Yoga Bible experience
en.value1_desc: Every teacher brings genuine knowledge from years of personal practice and study. We teach from experience, not just from books.
en.value2_desc: We adapt our teaching to the individual. Whatever your level, we meet you where you are and guide you forward.
en.value3_desc: Our teachers are eternal students. We continuously train and bring new knowledge and inspiration to you.
en.value4_desc: We build an inclusive, supportive environment where everyone can grow. Yoga Bible is more than a studio — it's a family.
en.approach_subtitle: A holistic approach to yoga education
en.approach_text: Yoga Bible's teachers combine traditional yoga wisdom with modern pedagogy. We believe in an integrated approach that connects asana, pranayama, philosophy, and anatomy into a comprehensive education.
en.approach1_desc: A maximum of 20 students per group ensures personal attention and in-depth feedback from your teachers.
en.approach2_desc: Our teachers provide individual, focused guidance that helps you understand and feel each posture correctly.
en.approach3_desc: We connect philosophy and anatomy directly to practice, so you don't just know how — but also why.
en.cta_title: Ready to Learn from the Best?
en.cta_text: Apply to Yoga Bible's yoga teacher training and begin your journey with our experienced teaching team.
